editorial_note: ERCOT's rare public self-repudiation of its own preliminary 367,790 MW forecast — with the CEO, senior counsel, and PUCT all describing the number as inflated — is the most striking data point yet on how hyperscale-AI interconnection queues have broken the traditional load-forecasting methodology.
